violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. CFSM application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was almost empty. Ice machine was turned off to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the reach-in shelving has an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap poster provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
